name: e2b-e2e
description: Minimal 1-node template for the LIVE --sandbox e2b end-to-end smoke: the node calls a CUSTOM provider (mmgw/nebius) via real pi in a remote E2B sandbox, writes one artifact (out/greeting.txt), and the host asserts that artifact is collected back via downloadDir. Proves the full runner→E2B path, not just connectivity.
